drain_assessment.assessment_note: This is an instructional video demonstration, not an actual task performance on a drain

technique_summary: This is an instructional demonstration video showing proper intracorporeal knot tying technique with good hand alternation and surgeon's knot formation. The video is educational in nature rather than a timed performance.
improvement_suggestions: This appears to be instructional content rather than a performance to be scored
